title: flammula lingua
intro: Flammula lingua, also known as the tongue-shaped tongue, is a species of fungus belonging to the genus Flammula in the family Strophariaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Flammula lingua include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Flammula lingua can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
